prompt: An anime promotional poster featuring a tender embrace between a young woman with short light blue hair in a black and white maid outfit and a young man with short black hair wearing a white, black, and orange track jacket. She rests her head peacefully on his chest with closed eyes, while he looks down affectionately with his arm around her. The background features soft, blurred pink cherry blossoms with dappled sunlight. Top left text features the logo "Re:ZERO - Starting Life in Another World -". Mid-left handwritten text reads "You're my hero, Subaru... ♡". Bottom right elegant text reads "A Bond Stronger Than Death." above "TV Anime Now Streaming!". High-quality official anime art style.
